title: Graham Hancock REVEALS Where The Ark of the Covenant Is Being Hidden
summary: Graham Hancock discusses his investigation into Ethiopian Christianity's connection to the Ark of the Covenant, including research into the indigenous Ethiopian Jewish community (Falashas/Beta Israel) and their claims about their ancestors bringing the Ark to Ethiopia via an island in the Nile.

key_claims.claim: Ethiopian Christianity is very Old Testament in its form and venerates a pre-Christian relic (the Ark of the Covenant)
There has been a Judaic community in Ethiopia going back into remote prehistory
The Falashas (Beta Israel) claim their ancestors brought the Ark of the Covenant to Ethiopia
The Beta Israel's ancestors lived on an island in the Nile for some hundreds of years before coming to Ethiopia
Historical verification confirms there was a Jewish community on an island in the Nile
